output:
**(B) A quality displacement loop.**

The causal chain forms a self-reinforcing cycle:

1. Paywall hides investigative work → social sharing drops
2. Reduced sharing → fewer new readers discover the journalism
3. Organization produces more free opinion content to compensate
4. Free tier attracts opinion-seeking audience, not investigation-seeking audience
5. Investigative journalists leave → less investigative capacity
6. Go to 1, but worse

Each iteration displaces more of the core value proposition (investigative journalism) with the substitute (opinion content), and the audience composition shifts to match — making reversal harder at each step.
